yesterdayAnalysis: Yesterday's 6.4mi run with TSS 58 and HR 141 was unscheduled — the plan called for Thursday's bike session with 3x8min race-pace intervals. This run appears to have replaced or pushed the critical bike workout. With only 16 days to Oregon and the plan specifically calling for 'last race-pace bike stimulus before Oregon taper' on Thursday, missing that structured bike session is a concern for race-specific sharpening.
todayRecommendation: Complete today's planned pool swim: 2,000m with 4x200 at 70.3 race pace. This is your final intensity swim before the taper window — execute the 200s at target effort (should feel controlled-hard, conversational between reps) and finish feeling sharp, not depleted.
